name: Qliro AB (publ)
summary: Qliro AB (publ) operates as a fintech company. The company offers online payment solutions to e-retailers and their customers in the Nordic region, as well as digital financial services to consumers in Sweden. It also offers consumer financing, personal loans, and savings accounts. The company was founded in 2014 and is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden. Qliro AB (publ) operates as a subsidiary of Qliro Group AB (publ).
